# Code Anchors: Workspace Resolution

- `libs/workspace/src/resolve.ts` — the single resolver entry point: role dispatch by which artifact is present, single-repo fallback on absence of both, and per-member checkout-state annotation.
- `libs/workspace/src/manifest.ts` — reads/parses/validates the hub manifest into the canonical workspace description; emits the structural diagnostics (malformed, missing field, unknown key, duplicate member).
- `libs/workspace/src/pointer.ts` — reads a member's hub pointer, locates the hub as a named sibling, and emits the member-side diagnostics (missing pointer, missing hub checkout, hub-remote mismatch, undeclared member).
- `libs/workspace/src/status.ts` — renders the status read-out (resolved workspace, single-repo mode, or failure) as plain terminal text.
- `libs/workspace/package.json` — the shared `@nexus/workspace` package: subpath exports, no barrel.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-workspace-status/scripts/workspace_status.ts` — the read-out entry point that invokes the resolver and prints its rendering.
- `.claude/skills/nxs-workspace-status/SKILL.md` — the workspace status read-out skill (the observable surface).
- `.nexus/config/templates/workspace-template.yml` — the hub manifest template leads copy into a real hub.
- `.nexus/config/templates/hub-template.yml` — the member pointer template.
- `libs/workspace/src/resolve.spec.ts` — parity, single-repo fallback, and checkout-state behavior.
- `libs/workspace/src/manifest.spec.ts` — hub-side parse/validate and diagnostics.
- `libs/workspace/src/pointer.spec.ts` — member-side resolution and diagnostics.
- `libs/workspace/src/status.spec.ts` — read-out rendering across the three cases.
